title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic has published research warning about AI self-improvement capabilities, noting that Claude is now performing code writing, review, experimentation, and research tasks. The video discusses warnings from both Anthropic and OpenAI about acceleration in AI development and the potential early stages of AI systems helping build better AI systems.
